hero.invitation: You are invited to our wedding

weekend.label: The weekend
weekend.title: The weekend programme
weekend.subtitle: A special weekend at the Masía. Come for as long as you can — the more the merrier.
weekend.fridayDesc: Arrival, welcome and quality time together before the big day.
weekend.saturdayDesc: The wedding. Ceremony, banquet and dancing until we can't anymore.
weekend.sundayDesc: We close the weekend the right way — unhurried, with coffee and great memories.

welcome.label: Welcome
welcome.mainTitle: We are getting married and we want to celebrate with you
welcome.description: We want this day to be as special for you as it is for us. Please confirm your attendance so we can organise everything with care.

venue.label: Venue
venue.descripcion: A unique setting among lavender fields to celebrate our big day.
venue.accommodationInfo: There is the possibility of booking accommodation at the Masía and surroundings. Let us know in the attendance form if you are interested and we will get in touch as soon as possible to share options and prices.
venue.googleMapsRec: We recommend using Google Maps for the best directions.

rsvp.label: RSVP
rsvp.title: Confirm your Attendance
rsvp.subtitle: We would love to have you with us on this special day
rsvp.howMany: How many people in your group?
rsvp.companionsHint: If you are coming alone, you can leave this empty
rsvp.childrenMenu: Do they need a children's menu?
rsvp.highChair: Do you need a high chair?
rsvp.allergiesPlaceholder: Optional: indicate the person's name and their allergy or special need
rsvp.accommodationAlert: For better planning, if you choose to come for all days with accommodation, we will get in touch to show you the different options and prices available.
rsvp.optionSatWithAccomSub: Saturday only, with accommodation at the Masía
rsvp.optionFriSatNoAccomSub: Friday pre-wedding at the Masía and Saturday wedding
rsvp.optionFriSatWithAccomSub: Friday pre-wedding and Saturday wedding, with accommodation at the Masía
rsvp.accommodationWhen: When do you need the accommodation?
rsvp.transport: Do you have transport to get there?
rsvp.successMessage: We have received your confirmation. See you at the wedding!
rsvp.errorMessage: We could not save your response. Please try again or contact us.
rsvp.validationCount: The number must be between 1 and 20

asistentes.title: Who is coming to the Wedding
asistentes.label: Confirmed
asistentes.subtitle: List updated in real time

admin.notEnoughData: Not enough data to display the timeline

guestlist.title: Our Guests
guestlist.beFirst: Be the first to confirm your attendance
guestlist.stillNotConfirmed: Haven't confirmed yet? We are waiting for you

attendance.noone: No one has confirmed for this day yet
